t_ch: 真的没事了吗？
t_en: You sure you're really all right?

t_ch: 我从来没有感觉这么好过…请别担心。
t_en: I've never felt this good before... Please don't worry about me.

t_ch: 要不还是先把特调喝了吧？
t_en: Why not drink the special drink first?

t_ch: 我已经找到了最后的「解决办法」…请别担心，一切都会变好的。
t_en: I've already found my final solution... Don't worry. Everything will turn out fine.

t_ch: 如果没有什么别的事，我就继续忙了。
t_en: If there's nothing else, I'd better get back to work.

t_ch: 真怀念现实里的微风和草地啊…真想找到一片宁静、柔软的田野，躺在里面，睡上一觉……
t_en: I really miss the gentle breeze and grass in real life... I really want to find a quiet, soft meadow, lie in it, and doze off...

t_ch: 今天就放个假吧。
t_en: Take the day off today.

t_ch: 不行哦——现在是工作时间，我不能擅离职位。
t_en: I can't. It's work hours now. I can't simply leave my station.

t_ch: 我可以陪你走走。
t_en: I'll take a walk with you.

t_ch: 不行哦——现在是工作时间，我不能擅离职位。
t_en: I can't. It's work hours now. I can't simply leave my station.

t_ch: 不过…您要是真的那么想帮忙的话，我的确有一件事想拜托您。
t_en: But... if you really wish to help, I do have a request to ask of you.

t_ch: 我有一样东西遗失在了梦境酒店——是一张唱片。您可以帮我拿回来吗？您看上去…有股强大的气场，肯定不怕酒店里的那些诡谲异常。
t_en: I lost something at the hotel in the Dreamscape: It was a record. Could you help me bring it back? You look like... you have a mighty air about you — you definitely won't be intimidated by those strange incidents going on in the hotel.

t_ch: 报酬方面，您不必担心…多少我都可以支付。毕竟金钱对我来说已经没有意义了。
t_en: As for the reward, you don't have to worry... I'll pay whatever it takes. Money has no meaning to me anymore.

t_ch: 我会帮你拿回来的。
t_en: I'll help you get it back.

t_ch: 感谢您的好心。
t_en: Thank you for your kindness.

t_ch: 但你要先把「特调」喝了。
t_en: But you must first drink the special drink.

t_ch: …好，如果这样能让您放心的话——请把它给我吧。
t_en: ...Okay, if it will make you happy. Please give it to me.

t_ch: 先把「特调」喝了吧。
t_en: You should drink the special drink first.

t_ch: …好，如果这样能让您放心的话——请把它给我吧。
t_en: ...Okay, if it will make you happy. Please give it to me.

t_ch: 您看——我已经把特调喝了。现在，请您放心去吧。
t_en: Look, I've drank it all. Now, please rest easy and go.

t_ch: 我有一样东西遗失在了梦境酒店——是一张唱片。您可以帮我拿回来吗？您看上去…有股强大的气场，肯定不怕酒店里的那些诡谲异常。
t_en: I lost something at the hotel in the Dreamscape: It was a record. Could you help me bring it back? You look like... you have a mighty air about you — you definitely won't be intimidated by those strange incidents going on in the hotel.

t_ch: 报酬方面，您不必担心…多少我都可以支付。毕竟金钱对我来说已经没有意义了。
t_en: As for the reward, you don't have to worry... I'll pay whatever it takes. Money has no meaning to me anymore.

t_ch: （柯柯娜小姐说的地方应该就在这附近了……）
t_en: (The place that Miss Cocona mentioned should be around here...)

t_ch: （危险的情绪会使梦境发生变异，看来那张唱片所承载的情感相当强烈……）
t_en: (Intense emotions will cause anomalies in the Dreamscape. It appears that the emotions contained in that record are quite strong...)

t_ch: （把那些奇形怪状的家伙消灭掉，应该就能拿到唱片了吧？那我就不客气了——）
t_en: (I should be able to get the record after eliminating those misshapen creatures. Time to fire on all cylinders then!)

t_ch: （一张满是灰尘和裂痕的唱片带，好像已经没法再播放了。）
t_en: (A record laden with dust and scratches — looks like it can't be played any longer.)

t_ch: （上面只录了一首歌，名字是…「想象一朵未来的玫瑰」。）
t_en: (There's only one song recorded on it, and its name is... "Envision a Rose Forthcoming.")

t_ch: （总之，先拿回去给她吧。）
t_en: (In any case, I'd better bring this back to her first.)

t_ch: 呕…呕……
t_en: *Barfs*... *Barfs*...

t_ch: 什么「心灵慰藉特调」…令人恶心……
t_en: This so-called Soulheal Special Mix... It's disgusting...

t_ch: 不过是为了让我乖乖留下罢了…不过是为了让我忘记自己究竟是谁……
t_en: It's just to make me stay obediently here... To make me forget who exactly I am...

t_ch: 那种东西…我再也不需要了…再也……
t_en: That thing... I don't need it ever again... Never again...

t_ch: 呕…呕……
t_en: *Barfs*... *Barfs*...

t_ch: 贵客，欢迎光临……
t_en: Welcome, esteemed guest...

t_ch: 啊，是您啊。您看，这回我没有忘记…欸，您已经拿到那张唱片了？真好。
t_en: Ah, it's you. Look, I didn't forget this time... Huh? You've already retrieved the record? Wonderful.

t_ch: 它对你很重要吗？
t_en: Is it very important to you?

t_ch: …只是上面承载的时光，还让我有些怀念。
t_en: ...I'm just somewhat nostalgic of the moments it holds.

t_ch: 它是你喜欢的歌手唱的吗？
t_en: It was sung by a singer you liked?

t_ch: 噢，不是…不过，也可以说是。
t_en: Oh, no... Well, I guess you could say that.

t_ch: 柯柯娜接过唱片，徒劳地拂去唱片上的污渍，却怎么也擦不干净。
t_en: Cocona takes the record and fruitlessly tries to clean up the grime on the record, but to no avail.

t_ch: 原来已经那么破旧了啊…那天我把它弄丢之后，就再也没想过能找回来。
t_en: To think it is really this worn-out... After I lost it on that day, I had never thought I would ever get it back.

t_ch: 感谢您…今晚，我想听着它睡去…最好就这样一睡不醒。
t_en: Thank you... Tonight, I will fall asleep while listening to it... Even better if I don't ever wake up.

t_ch: 对于一个已经千疮百孔的灵魂来说，这大概就是最好的结局了。
t_en: To a scarred and battered soul, this is probably the best ending.

t_ch: （柯柯娜的语气…有些不大对劲……）
t_en: (Cocona's tone... is a little strange...)

t_ch: 嘀嗒，{NICKNAME}，过来，快过来！
t_en: Tick-tock, {NICKNAME}, get over here, quick!

t_ch: 我有话要和你说，非常着急！快过来！
t_en: I have something to tell you. It's urgent! Get over here!

t_ch: 嘀嗒——{NICKNAME}，我觉得很不对劲！
t_en: Tick-tock, {NICKNAME}, I think something's very wrong!

t_ch: 一切都过于「正常」了。
t_en: Everything is too "normal."

t_ch: 这才是最大的「异常」！
t_en: This is the greatest anomaly!

t_ch: 柯柯娜的转变太突兀了。
t_en: Cocona's change is too abrupt.

t_ch: 真的很让人担心她在想什么。
t_en: I'm really worried about what she's thinking.

t_ch: 我们补上了柯柯娜缺失的情绪，让她的记忆变得清楚了些…但没想到，这下她变得更悲伤了！我有种感觉，她好像是在被某种可怕的东西折磨！
t_en: We patched up Cocona's lost emotion and made her memories somewhat more lucid... But it just made her sadder! I've got a feeling she's being tortured by something horrific!

t_ch: 我有很不好的预感，要是我们留她一个人在这里的话，会有很不好的事情发生——咱们不能丢下她不管！
t_en: I've got a bad feeling that if we leave her alone here, something very bad will happen. We can't leave her alone!

t_ch: 嗯，不能丢下柯柯娜。
t_en: Yes, we can't leave Cocona alone.

t_ch: 虽然有些冒犯，但现在也只能去她的内心看看了！必要的时候，我们得拉她一把！
t_en: It may be a bit intrusive, but the only thing we can do is to take a look inside her heart! We have to give her a hand if necessary!

t_ch: 她那么看重那张唱片，应该可以用它打开她的心锁吧？快去试试！
t_en: That record she values so much could be used to break the locks over her heart. Go try it now!

t_ch: 我有很不好的预感，如果我们留她一个人在这里的话，会有很不好的事情发生——咱们不能丢下她不管！
t_en: I've got a bad feeling that if we leave her alone here, something very bad will happen. We can't leave her alone!

t_ch: 嗯，不能丢下柯柯娜。
t_en: Yes, we can't leave Cocona alone.

t_ch: 虽然有些冒犯，但现在也只能去她的内心看看了！必要的时候，我们得拉她一把！
t_en: It may be a bit intrusive, but the only thing we can do is to take a look inside her heart! We have to give her a hand if necessary!

t_ch: 她那么看中那张唱片，应该可以用它打开她的心锁吧？快去试试！
t_en: That record she values so much could be used to unlock the locks over her heart. Go try it now!

t_ch: 柯柯娜的目光盯着那张唱片，她对周围的一切都没有反应。她似乎彻底陷入了沮丧。
t_en: Cocona's eyes stare at the record, oblivious to everything around her. It's as if she's been completely devoured by her dejection.

t_ch: 我们不会丢下你的。
t_en: We will not abandon you.

t_ch: 做好准备再来。
t_en: Come back when you're prepared.

t_ch: （这里就是柯柯娜的内心世界吗？摇摇欲坠的大楼，令人眩晕的高度……）
t_en: (This is the world of Cocona's heart? Swaying buildings on the verge of collapse, and such dizzying heights...)

t_ch: （柯柯娜就在前面，得快点赶上她。）
t_en: (Cocona is up ahead. Gotta catch up to her.)

t_ch: 少女的歌声轻轻地回荡在这片区域。它久久不散，仿佛在留恋着什么…然后，一段回忆从甜美的尾声中轻轻升起。
t_en: A young girl's singing faintly echoes across the area. It lingers for a long while as if longing for something... And then, a memory rises from the sweet epilogue.

t_ch: 柯柯娜，太棒了！无论是音准、律动还是情感，你的演唱水准都远超同龄人。你对音乐的理解力尤其高，能够迅速捕捉到歌曲想传达的精神…真是难得！
t_en: Cocona, that's amazing! Be it pitch, rhythm, or emotion, your vocal performance far surpasses those in your age group. You have a superb understanding of music, and can quickly capture the spirit that's being conveyed in a song... You are a rare talent!

t_ch: 还有你的音色——如丝缎般柔和，从低音到高音都一直保持着相当程度的音色统一，真是罕见的天赋……
t_en: And your timbre — It is smooth as satin, and from low to high pitches, you've managed to keep your timbres steady to a considerable degree. You have a rare and precious gift...

t_ch: 非常感谢您的教导，老师！我从来都没想过，从我的嗓子里能冒出那么美妙的歌声……
t_en: I truly appreciate your guidance, sir! I've never dreamed that such beautiful songs could be produced from my voice...

t_ch: 不用谢我，还是多感谢你自己的天赋和努力吧。要想成为万里挑一的歌者…你需要去找更好的老师、进行更刻苦的训练。
t_en: Don't thank me. Thank your own talent and hard work. If you wish to become a one-in-a-million singer... You must find a better teacher and embark on even more arduous training.

t_ch: 这个行业的竞争非常残酷，能在聚光灯下享受掌声的永远只有寥寥几人。
t_en: The competition in this industry is brutal. Only a fair few can stand under the limelight and bask in applause.

t_ch: 我…没想过那么远的事情。现在，我只是单纯喜欢唱歌而已。
t_en: I... haven't thought that far yet. For now, I just simply love to sing.

t_ch: 还没有做好准备吗？我能理解…但你总有一天要做出选择。
t_en: Are you not ready yet? I understand... But you will have to make a choice one day.

t_ch: 我和你一般大的时候，错失了许多宝贵的机会…听老师一句劝，柯柯娜——珍惜你的天赋，不要做出会让自己后悔的决定。
t_en: I missed many golden opportunities when I was your age... Listen to your teacher this once, Cocona. Treasure your talent, and don't make a choice you will regret.

t_ch: 老师……
t_en: Sir...

t_ch: 拥有梦想更是一件残酷的事——一旦求而不得，梦想破碎的痛感可能会彻底摧毁一个人。
t_en: Having a dream is a childish, cruel thing — If it is not attained, the pain from a shattered dream may utterly destroy a person.

t_ch: 努力向前吧，孩子…不要回头。你属于更广阔、更美好的舞台。
t_en: Work hard and walk forth, child... and don't look back. You belong to a grander, more magnificent stage.

t_ch: 我…我明白了，老师！我一定会努力的。
t_en: I... I understand, sir! I will do my best.

t_ch: 这是最后一堂课了，柯柯娜——我会把我知道的一切都教给你…绝不保留。
t_en: This is your final lesson, Cocona. I will teach you everything I know... I will hold nothing back.

t_ch: 记忆的潮水向你涌来。浪头穿过了你…回过神来时，你已经变成了柯柯娜的倒影。
t_en: The tide of memories surges towards you, and the waves pass through you... When you come to your senses, you have become Cocona's reflection.

t_ch: 这架钢琴就像我的朋友。无论喜悲，它总能和我一同分享，带给我安慰。
t_en: This piano is like my friend. Joy or sorrow, it will always share them with me and bring me comfort.

t_ch: 每次琴声响起的时候，我总会感觉自己身处另一个世界——老朋友，这次你也会陪我一起歌唱吧？
t_en: Each time the piano plays, I will feel myself transported to another world. Old friend, will you sing with me this time as well?

t_ch: 弹奏一串和弦。
t_en: Play a string of chords.

t_ch: 弹奏一段旋律。
t_en: Play a melody.

t_ch: 欸…突然想到一个不错的动机。略加发展的话，也许能写出一首好听的歌曲？
t_en: Hmm... I've suddenly thought of a good motif. If we expand on it just a little, perhaps we can even pen a nice melody?

t_ch: 该给它取个什么名字呢……
t_en: What name should I give it...

t_ch: 欸…突然想到一个不错的动机。略加发展的话，也许能写出一首好听的歌曲？
t_en: Hmm... I've suddenly thought of a good motif. If we expand on it just a little, perhaps we can even pen a nice melody?

t_ch: 该给它取个什么名字呢……
t_en: What name should I give it...

t_ch: 娜娜，眼看快要毕业了，你想好未来要做什么了吗？
t_en: Cocona, you're about to graduate soon. Have you decided on what you want to do in the future?

t_ch: 啊，问我吗？
t_en: Ah, me?

t_ch: 对呀…这里不就我们两个人吗？
t_en: Yeah... There are only the two of us here, aren't there?

t_ch: 别害羞嘛。这样，我先告诉你我想做什么，然后我们交换好不好？
t_en: Don't be shy. How about I tell you what I want to do first, then you tell me?

t_ch: 我…我还不确定。
t_en: I... I haven't decided.

t_ch: 别害羞嘛。这样，我先告诉你我想做什么，然后我们交换好不好？
t_en: Don't be shy. How about I tell you what I want to do first, then you tell me?

t_ch: 我也没有什么雄心壮志，不奢望能成为什么金融精英，只希望能去「烫金的时刻」找一份体面的工作，舒舒服服过完这一生就好啦。
t_en: I've no grand ambition, no desire to become some financial elite — I only hope to get a decent job at the Gilded Hour and live out a comfy life.

t_ch: 但我们神秘的娜娜、美丽的娜娜、聪明的娜娜肯定和我不一样…让我来猜猜，娜娜是不是想成为一名歌手？
t_en: But our mysterious Cocona, beautiful Cocona, smart Cocona, she's definitely different from me... Let me guess, you want to become a singer?

t_ch: 嗯，想从事音乐相关的工作。
t_en: Yes, I'd like to work in something related to music.

t_ch: 我就知道娜娜与众不同！等娜娜在匹诺康尼歌剧院举办演出的时候，我就要和别人炫耀：「看！那是我最好的朋友！」。
t_en: I knew you were different, Cocona! When you hold a concert at the Penacony Theater, I'm going to show off to everyone: "Look, that's my best friend!"

t_ch: 娜娜那么聪明，无论干什么都会很出色的。好期待以后有一天能摇着荧光棒，为舞台上的你加油呀…我能想象出那时你的样子，一定美极了。
t_en: You're so smart, and you'll succeed in anything you do. I can't wait for the day I'll be able to wave glowsticks and cheer for you on stage... I bet you'll be so gorgeous when that time comes.

t_ch: 我会努力变成你想象中的样子。
t_en: I'll work hard to become that image in your mind.

t_ch: 娜娜最近就在努力吧？上课的时候老是走神，肯定又在写新歌吧？
t_en: Cocona, have you been working hard recently? You're always in a daze in class — you must be writing a new song again, aren't you?

t_ch: 这都被你发现了……
t_en: How did you even guess...

t_ch: 只写了一个开头……
t_en: I've only written an opening so far...

t_ch: 给我看看嘛…哪怕就透露一下名字也行。
t_en: Come on. Let me take a peek... Even just a name will do fine.

t_ch: 名字来自我最喜欢的诗人——
t_en: The name is from my favorite poet...

t_ch: ——「想象一朵未来的玫瑰」。
t_en: ..."Envision a Rose Forthcoming."

t_ch: 好有诗意的名字啊…光看歌名就知道是首好歌！写完的时候一定要给我看哦！
t_en: A wonderfully poetic name... I'm certain it'll be a great song, judging just from its name! You have to show it to me when you're done!

t_ch: 等你上台演绎这首歌的那天，你的梦想一定会和匹诺康尼的十二时分交相辉映…想想就觉得了不起！
t_en: Wait till you're performing this song on the stage. Your dream will shine as bright as Penacony's Twelve Hours... I'm impressed just thinking about it!

t_ch: 我就知道我的娜娜与众不同！等娜娜在匹诺康尼歌剧院举办演出的时候，我就要和别人炫耀：「看！那是我最好的朋友！」。
t_en: I knew my Cocona is incredible! When you organize a concert at the Penacony Theater, I'm going to show off to everyone: "Look, that's my best friend!"

t_ch: 等你上台演绎这首歌的那天，你的梦想一定会和匹诺康尼的十二时分交相辉映…想想就觉得了不起！
t_en: Wait till you're performing this song on the stage. Your dream will shine as bright as Penacony's Twelve Hours... I'm impressed just thinking about it!

t_ch: 娜娜，你已经长大了，想好以后要怎么生活了吗？
t_en: Cocona, you're all grown up now. Have you thought about how you want to live your life yet?

t_ch: 娜娜，你为什么总是不肯告诉我们你的未来规划？听说你们的同学都有着落了，我们也很着急啊……
t_en: Cocona, why do you keep refusing to tell us your plans for the future? I hear your classmates have all found their places in life, and we're getting antsy too...

t_ch: 哎，这孩子…从小就古怪，不知道遗传了谁的脾气。
t_en: *sigh* This girl... She's always been an odd one since young. I wonder who she takes after.

t_ch: 你有什么资格说这话？你管过她哪怕一天吗？没本事的家伙！
t_en: And what gives you the right to say that? Have you ever cared about her one bit? Useless bum!

t_ch: 别吵了……
t_en: Please don't fight...

t_ch: 还不是因为你，让我们操碎了心……
t_en: It's all because of you! We're worried to death...

t_ch: 你们吵吧。
t_en: You know what? Keep fighting.

t_ch: 你啊你…和你爸一模一样，只会惹我生气！我不知道为这个家操了多少心……
t_en: You... you're just like your father, always making me mad! You have no idea how much I've worried for this family...

t_ch: 行了，别在一边大呼小叫了。娜娜，和我们说说吧——你以后是怎么打算的？
t_en: All right. Stop it! Stop screaming! Cocona, tell us. What are your plans for the future?

t_ch: 我想从事音乐相关的工作。
t_en: I'd like to work in something related to music.

t_ch: …什么？你再说一遍，我怕我没听清楚。
t_en: ...What? Say that again. I don't think I heard you right.

t_ch: 我就知道…就不该让她参加那什么学生合唱团！
t_en: I knew it... We shouldn't have let her join that student choir!

t_ch: 我想从事和音乐相关的工作。
t_en: I'd like to work in something related to music.

t_ch: 音乐…唱歌…小娜，你是不是最近太累了，才会有这种天真的想法？
t_en: Music... singing... Cocona, is it because you've been so tired recently that you're having such naive thoughts?

t_ch: 你又没受过正规训练，长得又不算漂亮，声线也只能说普通…小娜，我们还是想点实际的出路吧，好吗？
t_en: You're not even classically trained, and you're not exactly pretty, and your voice is ordinary at best... Cocona, let's think of something more practical, shall we?

t_ch: 老师说我可以走这条路……
t_en: My teacher said I could walk this path...

t_ch: 别人说什么你就信什么？你都多大了，别整天像个小孩子那么天真……
t_en: And you believe what anyone tells you? You're not young anymore. Stop acting like a naive child...

t_ch: 我想出去学习，努力拿奖学金……
t_en: I want to go out and learn, and work hard for a scholarship...

t_ch: 学习…你还想学几年呐？你都多大了，别整天像个小孩子那么天真……
t_en: Learn... How many more years do you want to study? You're not young anymore. Stop acting like a naive child...

t_ch: 你是不是又被那个声乐老师给忽悠了，所以才会冒出这些奇怪的想法？他就是看你单纯好骗，想靠话术再多捞点学费！
t_en: Have you been misled by that music teacher again? Is that why you're having such strange thoughts? He just thinks you're naive and easy to fool, and is trying to scam you into paying more tuition!

t_ch: 娜娜，你要记得，我们和家族还有那些有钱的逐梦客不一样…我们是匹诺康尼本地人，跟那些有钱人相比，我们没有那么多好选择。
t_en: Cocona, you must remember that we're different from The Family and those wealthy Dreamchasers... We're Penaconian natives — compared to those rich folk, we don't have many choices laid out for us.

t_ch: 听爸妈的吧，我们在酒店工作那么久，也算跟家族建立了点关系。之前听说「黄金的时刻」有家奢侈品商店在招店员，你不如去试试。
t_en: Listen to your parents. We've worked a long time at the hotel, and have some connections with The Family. I heard that there's a luxury goods store at the Golden Hour that's hiring. Why not give that a try?

t_ch: 但唱歌是我的梦想。
t_en: But singing is my dream.

t_ch: 你这孩子，怎么这么执拗？在匹诺康尼聊「梦想」，你自己不觉得奇怪吗？
t_en: Kid, why are you so stubborn? Mouthing off the word "dream" in Penacony... do you not think yourself strange?

t_ch: 等接受了这份工作，你每天都能泡在梦里，想从里面出来都难——还有什么可抱怨的？
t_en: When you accept this job, you'll be so immersed in dreams all day that you won't ever want to wake up. What's there to gripe about?

t_ch: 娜娜…妈妈知道你喜欢唱歌，但很多时候爱好就是爱好，爱好是没法变成饭碗的。你该认清楚现实，然后好好下决定。
t_en: Cocona... Mom knows that you love singing, but hobbies are just that — hobbies. They aren't meant to be a means of living. You should face reality and then make a proper decision.

t_ch: 这次，我同意你妈妈的看法。你可要好好选，千万别让我们失望。
t_en: For once, I agree with your mother. You should choose carefully. Do not disappoint us.

t_ch: 去奢侈品店工作。
t_en: Work at the luxury goods store.

t_ch: 不，从事音乐相关的工作。
t_en: No, I wish to work in something related to music.

t_ch: …好好选，千万别让我们失望。
t_en: ...Choose carefully. Do not disappoint us.

t_ch: 去奢侈品店工作。
t_en: Work at the luxury goods store.

t_ch: 不，从事音乐相关的工作。
t_en: No, I wish to work in something related to music.

t_ch: …好好选，千万别让我们失望。
t_en: ...Choose carefully. Do not disappoint us.

t_ch: 你只能进奢侈品商店工作。
t_en: Your only choice is to work at the luxury goods store.

t_ch: 这样才对，这才是我们的乖娜娜。等你正式开始工作，工资什么的我们先来替你保管——等以后你成家了再还给你。
t_en: Right. That's our girl. When you officially start work, we'll help save up your wages for you first. When you're ready to get married, we'll return them to you.

t_ch: 你也不懂理财，放在我们这里更好。
t_en: You don't know the first thing about managing your expenses. It's better that you safekeep your wages with us.

t_ch: 当然了，爸爸妈妈…不管你们说什么，做什么……
t_en: Of course, Father, Mother... No matter what you say or do...

t_ch: 「都是为了我好」。
t_en: "It's all for my own good."

t_ch: 那只外表精美雅致的礼盒，封装着我已经朽烂的未来。
t_en: That beautiful and intricate gift box holds my already-rotten future.

t_ch: （柯柯娜就在前面…这次又会遇到什么样的记忆？）
t_en: (Cocona is just up ahead... What memories will I encounter this time?)

t_ch: （也许要等经历完这一切，才能抵达她的内心深处。）
t_en: (Maybe I have to see this through to the end to reach the depths of her heart.)

t_ch: 身着华贵服饰的老妇人站在奢侈品商店中，似乎在等待什么人过来。
t_en: An old lady who is dressed to the nines stands outside the luxury store, as if waiting for someone to arrive.

t_ch: 格尔温太太，您来了。今天想看看什么？
t_en: Mrs. Gerwin, you're here. What would you like to look at today?

t_ch: 柯柯娜，你终于来了，我等你等了好久。
t_en: Cocona, you're finally here. I've waited for you for so long.

t_ch: 抱歉，刚刚在…清点货物。上次的那件大衣，您还满意吗？
t_en: My apologies, I was... taking stock. Were you satisfied with the long coat the other time?

t_ch: 别说了，穿出去之后，别人都说合适呢，好像一下子年轻了好多岁。
t_en: Of course! Everyone complimented me when I wore it out, as if I looked ten years younger.

t_ch: 找到一件适合自己的衣服和找到知己一样难——所幸有你介绍，我最近找到了不少「知己」。
t_en: Finding clothing that suits you is as difficult as finding a soulmate — it's all thanks to your recommendation that I've been able to find quite a few "soulmates."

t_ch: 那太好了…您尤其适合稍稍偏冷的颜色，和您的肤色和体态都非常相称。
t_en: That's great... You're especially suited for cooler tones — it matches your skin tone and body shape.

t_ch: 你的声音还是那么好听。我没记错的话，你喜欢唱歌对吧？我儿子也是学声乐的，你们有空可以一起聊聊。
t_en: Your voice is ever so melodious. If I recall correctly, you love to sing, right? My son studies music too, and you two should talk when you're free.

t_ch: 我…恐怕是您记错了，我没有怎么学过声乐。
t_en: I... I'm afraid you've recalled wrongly. I've never studied music before.

t_ch: 嗐，我开玩笑的，年纪一大就喜欢唠叨…先陪我一起逛逛吧，我太久没听过你的声音了，多少有点惦记呢。
t_en: Ha, I was just joking. You know how people ramble on at my age... Accompany me around the store. I haven't heard your voice in a while, and I do miss it.

t_ch: 嗯，您跟我来。
t_en: Yes, please follow me.

t_ch: 那天，格尔温太太满载而归。
t_en: That day, Mrs. Gerwin had a fruitful haul.

t_ch: 能力出众、踏实肯干的柯柯娜，在很短的时间内就成为了店里的明星销售。
t_en: The capable and down-to-earth Cocona did not take long to become the store's star employee.

t_ch: 继续深入记忆之海，亲历柯柯娜的过去……
t_en: Continue into the sea of memories to experience Cocona's past first-hand...

t_ch: 恭喜你啊柯柯娜。我听说格尔温太太和那个里尔克先生都是出了名的难缠，挑剔又刻薄。
t_en: Congrats, Cocona. I've heard that Mrs. Gerwin and Mr. Rilke are both infamously tough customers, picky and rude.

t_ch: 要是我也能有你那么漂亮的声音就好了…那样我保准也能把人弄得五迷三道的，乖乖把口袋里的钱掏出来。
t_en: If only I had a beautiful voice like yours... I'd surely mesmerize those fat cats into emptying their pockets on their own.

t_ch: 他们不是那样的人。
t_en: They aren't like that.

t_ch: 你才来了多久，就知道他们是什么样的人了？
t_en: You've only been here for a little while. How would you know what kind of people they are?

t_ch: 我只是在真诚地对待客人。
t_en: I'm only being sincere to the guests.

t_ch: 你是说我们工作的态度不够真诚？
t_en: Are you saying our attitude isn't sincere?

t_ch: 我们都懂…上次，还有人碰见你和格尔温太太的儿子一起吃饭呢。听说你们亲密得很，现在进展到哪一步了？小心那些有钱人，他们最擅长欺骗感情了。
t_en: We all know... Someone even ran into you having a meal with Mrs. Gerwin's son the other time. I heard you two were getting quite cozy too. So how far into the relationship are you? Beware of those rich folk. They're all masters at manipulating people's feelings.

t_ch: 噢，还有一次，你待在老板办公室那么久，有说有笑的…想必又拿到不少优质的客户源吧？
t_en: Oh, there was another time when you were in the boss' office for a long time, chatting and laughing... I bet you got quite the windfall in customer leads, didn't you?

t_ch: 不是你想的那样…
t_en: It's not what you think...

t_ch: 请听我解释……
t_en: Please hear me out...

t_ch: 哎呀，没关系的…你还这么年轻，做事张扬点也很正常。你以为这里的前辈不想走捷径吗？条件不允许而已……
t_en: C'mon, it's fine... You're still young, and it's perfectly normal to be showy about these things. You think the more senior staff don't think about using relationships to skip ahead? They just don't have the means for it...

t_ch: 你们这些匹诺康尼本地人真拼啊，为了上位什么手段都能用上——哦，对了，听说你的工作也是走后门找的？
t_en: You Penacony natives sure put everything on the line, willing to go the whole length just to rise through the ranks... Oh right, I hear you also got this job through connections?

t_ch: 给你一句过来人的忠告：这些小把戏足够让你找到一份体面的工作，但想凭这些手段敲开上流社会的门？还是趁早死了这条心吧……
t_en: A word of advice from someone who's been around the block: These parlor tricks are enough for you to find a decent job, but to knock on the door of the elite with such moves? You're better off giving up right now...

t_ch: 唉？你别哭啊——都是我不好，我不该当着大家的面说这些的。
t_en: Huh? Oh don't cry... It's all my fault. I shouldn't have said all this in front of everyone.

t_ch: 时间不早，我先下班了。下个系统时的轮班安排，还有那份报表，就拜托你啦。
t_en: It's getting late. I'm clocking out. I'll leave the next system hour's shift schedule and that report to you. Thanks.
...Sure.

t_ch: …我知道了。
t_en: ...I see.

t_ch: 在窃窃的笑声和嫉妒的眼光中，柯柯娜回到了现实，并开始惧怕第二天的到来。
t_en: Amidst low snickers and jealous stares, Cocona returns to reality, dreading the next day's arrival.

t_ch: 哎呀，没关系的…你还这么年轻，做事张扬点也很正常。你以为这里的前辈不想走捷径吗？条件不允许而已……
t_en: C'mon, it's fine... You're still young, and it's perfectly normal to be showy about these things. You think the more senior staff don't think about using relationships to skip ahead? They just don't have the means for it...

t_ch: 时间不早，我先下班了。下个系统时的轮班安排，还有那份报表，就拜托你啦。
t_en: It's getting late. I'm clocking out. I'll leave the next system hour's shift schedule and that report to you. Thanks.
...Sure.

t_ch: …我知道了。
t_en: ...I see.

t_ch: 柯柯娜——最近你是怎么回事？这样下去，我怀疑还有没有必要和你续劳务合同。
t_en: Cocona... What's wrong with you recently? If you keep this up, I'm going to start wondering whether I should renew your work contract.

t_ch: 最近这批商品有问题…
t_en: There's a problem with this recent batch of goods...

t_ch: 我不能欺骗老客户…
t_en: I can't scam our loyal customers...

t_ch: 谁告诉你这批货有问题了？柯柯娜，你记住——在「黄金的时刻」，那些有钱的客户看重的不是商品的质量，而是品牌效应！
t_en: Who told you there was a problem with these? Cocona, you best remember — In the Golden Hour, those wealthy customers don't care about product quality, but branding!

t_ch: 只要有品牌、有故事，哪怕是一只破麻布袋他们也会欣然买下！有钱人压根不会在意买来的鞋子容不容易坏，因为他们从来都不用靠自己的脚走路——懂了吗？
t_en: As long as there's a brand and a story, they'll gladly buy even a torn hemp pouch! The rich care not if a purchased pair of shoes is easily worn, because they've never had to rely on their own feet to walk. Do you get it now?

t_ch: 但那还是在说谎…
t_en: But it's still lying...

t_ch: 如果说谎就会遭惩罚，你猜那些游手好闲的富人能活到现在吗？
t_en: If lying is cause for punishment, you think those indolent rich folk would still be alive now?

t_ch: 这样做对客户不公平……
t_en: This is unfair to the customer...

t_ch: 如果这个世界是公平的，那些游手好闲的富人根本就不该出现！
t_en: If this world was fair, those indolent rich folk should never have existed in the first place!

t_ch: 要说撒谎，这整片梦境不就是一个家族建造出来的美丽谎言吗？醒醒吧，没人在乎你说的是不是实话，只要能吸引人买单就够了。
t_en: Speaking of lies, isn't this entire Dreamscape a beautiful lie spun by The Family? Wake up. No one cares if what you say is truth, as long as you can get people to foot the bill.

t_ch: 还有，我这几天已经听到不止一个人反映，你恶意抢走他们的老客户，破坏了同事间的合作氛围。实话说，我对你相当失望……
t_en: Also, I've already received more than one complaint these past few days from other employees that you maliciously stole away their loyal customers and damaged our work culture. To be honest, I'm quite disappointed in you...

t_ch: 你家里应该也不富裕吧？那就少摆出一副清高的样子。你真的以为匹诺康尼是什么美梦？告诉你吧，它能烧得如此耀眼，靠的完全是我们这些「燃料」！
t_en: Your family's not wealthy, right? Then stop posing like you can afford to maintain so-called virtues. You really think Penacony is some beautiful dream? Let me tell you — the reason it burns so bright is because of "fuel" like us!

t_ch: 给你五个系统时的期限——业绩再上不去，你就回家吧。
t_en: I'll give you a deadline of five system hours — if you can't get your performance up to par by the end of it, just go home.

t_ch: 可我没有错……
t_en: But I'm not in the wrong...

t_ch: 那错的是谁？难道是我吗？
t_en: Then who is? Me?

t_ch: 我应该怎么改正？
t_en: How can I do better?

t_ch: 这是我需要思考的问题吗？自己慢慢悟吧。
t_en: That's not a problem for me, is it? You should think about it yourself.

t_ch: 你该彻彻底底地改掉自己的毛病，平时多向你的同事学习。
t_en: You should absolutely rid yourself of your bad habits and learn from your coworkers.

t_ch: 要说撒谎，这整片梦境不就是一个家族建造出来的美丽谎言吗？醒醒吧，没人在乎你说的不是不是实话，只要能吸引人买单就够了。
t_en: Speaking of lies, isn't this entire Dreamscape a beautiful lie spun by The Family? Wake up. No one cares if what you say is true, as long as you can get people to foot the bill.

t_ch: 还有，我这几天已经听到不止一个人反映，你恶意抢走他们的老客户，破坏了同事间的合作氛围。实话说，我对你相当失望……
t_en: Also, I've already received more than one complaint these past few days from other employees that you maliciously stole away their loyal customers and damaged the work culture. To be honest, I'm quite disappointed in you...

t_ch: 给你五个系统时的期限——业绩再上不去，你就回家吧。
t_en: I'll give you a deadline of five system hours — if you can't get your performance up to par by the end of it, just go home.

t_ch: （也许我真的永远无法在梦境世界中立足……）
t_en: (I may never be able to hold my own in the Dreamscape...)

t_ch: （我从出生起就是一只囚鸟，我早该明白的…可是…可是……）
t_en: (I've been a caged bird since birth. I should've realized that... But... But...)

t_ch: （狠心点…柯柯娜，你还背负着很多人的期待呢…这也许就是成人的游戏规则吧。）
t_en: (Be more strict on yourself... Cocona, you carry the wishes of so many people on your shoulders... Perhaps these are the rules of the game in the adult world.)

t_ch: 你是谁？你和我长得很像，但我认不出你了。
t_en: Who are you? You look just like me, but I don't recognize you.

t_ch: 我是柯柯娜。
t_en: I am Cocona.

t_ch: 你想取代我…但你并不是我。
t_en: You wish to replace me... But you're not me.

t_ch: 我也不知道我是谁。
t_en: I don't know who I am either.

t_ch: 不怪你，这世上的人大多都是如此。
t_en: I don't blame you — many are the same in this world.

t_ch: 柯柯娜…你能欺骗所有人，但骗不过自己。
t_en: Cocona... You can lie to everyone, but you can't lie to yourself.

t_ch: 你已经很久没来找过我了…此时此刻，你出现在这里…你想要什么？你在渴求什么？
t_en: You haven't come to find me for a long time... And yet, you're here now.... What do you want? What do you desire?

t_ch: 我需要一个新的自己。
t_en: I need a new me.

t_ch: 还记得吗？少女时期，你曾对自己许下承诺——无论未来发生什么，你都要一直微笑下去。可现在呢？你已经把它忘得一干二净……
t_en: Do you remember? When you were young, you once made yourself a promise — no matter what happened, you would always smile. But now? You've entirely forgotten...

t_ch: 你会用怎样的酷刑对付我？你会<color=#dbc291ff>用何种手段毁掉自己的纯真、善良、诚实、还有原则？</color>是痛快地一刀两断…还是通过经年累月的折磨？
t_en: What cruel punishment will you mete upon me? You will <color=#dbc291ff>use any and all means to destroy your own innocence, kindness, honesty, and principles?</color> Will you sever it in two in a heartbeat... or tortuously grind it down with time?

t_ch: 杀死了我之后…你能得到什么？你还能给自己留下些什么？
t_en: After you kill me... what will you have gained? What else can you leave for yourself?

t_ch: 对不起，我没有选择。
t_en: I'm sorry. I had no choice.

t_ch: 我自知我不是你的对手。在无法逃避的丑陋现实面前，一切美德都不堪一击。
t_en: I already know I am not your match. All virtues are shattered with a single touch before the inescapable and ugly truth.

t_ch: 但我会尽我所能对抗你，因为我是你的纯真、善良、诚实、还有原则。
t_en: But I will give my all to resist you — because I am your innocence, kindness, honesty, and principles.

t_ch: 无论如何，我还是希望能为自己留下一颗种子，留下一朵…未来的玫瑰。
t_en: No matter what, I still hope to leave behind a seed, a bloom... of a future's rose.

t_ch: 柯柯娜…消灭你的纯真、善良、诚实和原则——然后迎接你的成功。
t_en: Cocona... vanquish your innocence, kindness, honesty and principles, and then embrace your victory.

t_ch: 继续吧，柯柯娜…抛弃那些无用之物，去满足他人对你的期望吧。
t_en: Continue forth, Cocona... Abandon all meaningless material objects, and fulfill the expectations others have for you.

t_ch: 你赢了…柯柯娜……
t_en: You won... Cocona...

t_ch: 记住…给自己留下一颗种子…留下一朵…未来的玫瑰……
t_en: Remember... to leave a seed for yourself... to leave a blooming... of a future's rose...

t_ch: 那份甜蜜的冰激凌，仿佛在记忆中永不会融化……
t_en: That sweet ice-cream looks unmeltable in memories...

t_ch: （最后一段回忆，又会是什么样的呢？）
t_en: (What will the final memory have in store?)

t_ch: 我想清楚了。我不想再继续这样生活下去了。
t_en: I've thought it through. I do not wish to continue living like this.

t_ch: 赢下这场比赛之后，我们就能赚到足够的钱，离开匹诺康尼。
t_en: After winning this match, we will earn enough money to leave Penacony.

t_ch: 还记得我们聊过的那个星球吗？那里被蓝色的海水覆盖，有分明的四季，有真实的生活。我们会彼此陪伴，也能追求各自的梦想。
t_en: Still remember that planet we talked about? Blanketed in azure seas, it has distinct seasons and is a place where we can truly live. We would be with each other, and we could pursue our own dreams.

t_ch: 太危险了…非得参加那个比赛吗？
t_en: It's too dangerous... Do you have to compete?

t_ch: 娜娜…靠着你的收入，我们短期内确实可以衣食无忧…但你我都清楚，这不是我们想要的生活。我们都是渴望飞翔的鸟…这困于尘土的生活不属于我们。
t_en: Cocona... We'll have no problem supporting ourselves temporarily with your income... But you and I know that this isn't the life we want. We clamor to be birds soaring through the skies... This life shackled in dust does not belong to us.

t_ch: 可是……
t_en: But...

t_ch: 开心点嘛，娜娜——我可是很擅长机动球的！你瞧——
t_en: Cheer up, Cocona... I'm a pro at Roboball! Look...

t_ch: 柯柯娜的恋人摆出滑稽的姿势，让她笑出了声。他们又重新依偎在一起。
t_en: Cocona's lover poses comically, eliciting a laugh from her. They embrace and cuddle up against each other yet again.

t_ch: 我头一次发现…原来现实中的匹诺康尼也那么美。梦境里的那些霓虹灯光…总是让我想起深海。我经常会感到迷失。
t_en: I'm noticing for the first time... that Penacony looks quite pretty in reality as well. The neon lights of the Dreamscape... makes me think of the unfathomable sea. I feel lost all the time.

t_ch: 当初建设匹诺康尼的人，又是怀着怎样的初衷呢…他们会不会想到有这么一天，居然会有人会傻到想要逃离他们建造的这座乐园？
t_en: The people who built Penacony, what intentions did they bear... Did they think that, one day, there'd be someone foolish enough to flee this haven that they built?

t_ch: 外人眼里的匹诺康尼是一个美妙的幻梦——但只有我们知道它的本质，柯柯娜。
t_en: Penacony is a wondrous dreamy illusion to outsiders' eyes, but only we know its true nature, Cocona.

t_ch: 嗯…你说得对。在「黄金的时刻」之下，埋葬了太多人美梦的残骸。
t_en: Mm... You're right. Buried are the numerous remnants of people's dreams beneath the Golden Hour.

t_ch: 啊…我突然有了灵感。
t_en: Ah... Inspiration has suddenly struck me.

t_ch: 「想象一朵未来的玫瑰……」
t_en: Envision a Rose Forthcoming...

t_ch: 对——我知道该怎么给这首歌结尾了。
t_en: Yes... I know how to end this song.

t_ch: 我也想好了。
t_en: I've also made up my mind.

t_ch: …什么？
t_en: ...Huh?

t_ch: 结尾就是，十天之后，我们登上驶离匹诺康尼的飞船——「从梦中醒来」，拥抱真实的生活。
t_en: The ending is, in ten days, we will board the spaceship departing Penacony and wake up from the dream, embracing our real lives.

t_ch: 在那之前，我要努力训练，争取以最好的状态给你带回奖杯。柯柯娜…你真的不来看吗？
t_en: Before that, I have to train hard and reach my best state to bring back the trophy for you. Cocona... Are you really not coming to see me?

t_ch: 庞德，我太容易紧张了。而且，有我在旁边看着…你也不会安心的…趁这段时间，我也处理一下工作方面的交接。
t_en: Pound, I get nervous too easily. And you won't feel relaxed either if I'm watching the match... I should also take this time to hand over my work.

t_ch: 好，那就这么决定了——等着看我凯旋吧，娜娜！到时候，我们老地方见……
t_en: All right. It's decided then. Await my triumphant return, Cocona! When the time comes, we will meet at our old haunt...

t_ch: 在黑暗和阴冷中生活的柯柯娜…曾经也拥有过一束暖光。
t_en: Cocona, who lived in cold darkness... used to possess a single ray of light.

t_ch: 在离开匹诺康尼之前，还需要收集一些东西……
t_en: Before leaving Penacony, there are still some things to collect...

t_ch: 娜娜，闭上眼睛——
t_en: Cocona, close your eyes...

t_ch: 你感到了柔软光滑的硬质材料滑入手心，上面还带着另一个人淡淡的体温。
t_en: You feel something made from a soft, smooth, and solid material sliding into your palm, the warmth of another person lingering on its surface.

t_ch: 猜猜这是什么？
t_en: Guess what this is.

t_ch: 专辑？
t_en: A record?

t_ch: 演唱会门票？
t_en: A concert ticket?

t_ch: 口琴？
t_en: A harmonica?

t_ch: 哇，这么简单的问题，娜娜怎么都猜不中啊！
t_en: Woah, such a simple question, and you still didn't get it right!

t_ch: 谜底揭晓——是船票！十天之后的船票，特别买了靠窗的座位…这样我们就可以一起欣赏银河的美景了。
t_en: The answer is: A ship ticket! A ticket departing in ten days. I even bought two window seats... We can enjoy the stars together that way.

t_ch: …娜娜？你怎么哭了，娜娜…我们应该高兴才是啊……
t_en: ...Cocona? Why are you crying, Cocona... We should be happy...

t_ch: 躺在掌心中的小小车票那么轻，又那么沉重，仿佛拥有拽动未来的力量。
t_en: The palm-sized ticket rests in her hands — so light, yet so heavy, as if it possesses a power to drag the future along with it.

t_ch: 娜娜，我马上就要去泰科铵参加比赛了——等比赛一结束我就回来找你，我们老地方见。
t_en: Cocona, I'm going to Taikiyan and joining the competition. I'll come back and look for you when it's over — we'll meet at our old haunt.

t_ch: 到时候怕忘记了，我的档案证件什么的，都放在你那里好了。
t_en: In case I forget, I'm leaving my file and papers with you.

t_ch: 嗯，交给我保管吧。
t_en: You can count on me to keep them safe.

t_ch: 不要有压力。
t_en: Don't get too stressed out.

t_ch: 哪有什么压力？放心吧，能打败我的只有我自己！
t_en: Me, stressed? Don't worry. I'm the only one who can beat me!

t_ch: 别担心，我会第一时间赶回来。话说回来，娜娜…你是不是还有什么东西没给我？
t_en: Don't worry. I'll hurry back first thing. Speaking of which, Cocona... Is there something you're forgetting to give me?

t_ch: …有了这个吻，我绝对无往不胜！别忘了「想象一朵未来的玫瑰」——我要成为第一个听到它的人！
t_en: ...With this kiss, I'll never ever lose! Don't forget "Envision a Rose Forthcoming" — I will be the first person to hear it!

t_ch: 柯柯娜踮起脚尖，轻轻地吻了吻庞德的脸颊……
t_en: Cocona tiptoes and gently kisses Pound's face...

t_ch: 庞德，我来了！你提前到了吗…担心死我了，比赛结束我也没有得到你的消息……
t_en: Pound, I'm here! Did you have to wait long...? I was worried sick, since you didn't contact me after the competition ended...

t_ch: （咦？那不是庞德……）
t_en: (Huh? That isn't Pound...)

t_ch: …柯柯娜小姐？
t_en: ...Miss Cocona?

t_ch: 我是…您是哪位？
t_en: That's me... And you are?

t_ch: 啊…很高兴认识您。我是庞德的朋友，是来替他传话的。
t_en: Ah... A pleasure. I'm Pound's friend. I'm here to deliver a message in his stead.

t_ch: 传话…为什么？他和我约好了要在这里见面，然后我们一起离开……
t_en: In his stead... Why? He promised to meet me here, and then we would leave together...

t_ch: …情况恐怕有变，柯柯娜小姐。我猜，庞德之所以让我来给您传话，是因为…咳，是因为他大概不会再回匹诺康尼了。
t_en: ...I'm afraid circumstances have changed, Miss Cocona. I'm guessing that the reason Pound had me deliver his message to you, is because... Ahem, it's because he probably won't be returning to Penacony.

t_ch: …您还好吗？柯柯娜小姐？
t_en: ...Are you all right? Miss Cocona?
Ah...

t_ch: 我理解…我很遗憾。但庞德希望我能把事情的所有真相都一五一十地告诉您，他相信这样能让您好受一些。
t_en: I understand... It's just regretful. But Pound hoped that I would tell you the whole truth. He believed that it would make you feel better.

t_ch: 为了能够达成和您的承诺，庞德他…向家族借了一笔钱，数额很大的一笔钱。
t_en: In order to achieve his promise to you, Pound... borrowed a sum of money from The Family — an inordinate amount.

t_ch: 他把这笔钱全部用在了押注上——他赌自己能获得这次业余组机动球比赛的冠军。
t_en: He used all this money on a bet — he bet that he would become champion in the amateur bracket of the Roboball competition.

t_ch: 很遗憾…虽然庞德的技术精湛，但竞技比赛永远有它难以预料的部分。庞德最后以微弱的差距拿到了亚军，但这也意味着……
t_en: Alas... Pound's technique was superb, but competition always has its unpredictability. Pound only lost the championship by a hair's breadth, but that also means...

t_ch: …呃，我想您知道这意味着什么，柯柯娜小姐。
t_en: ...Err, I think you know what it means, Miss Cocona.

t_ch: 他…还安全吗？
t_en: Is he... safe?

t_ch: 老实说，柯柯娜小姐，我不知道…也最好不要知道。
t_en: Truthfully, Miss Cocona, I don't know... And I don't think I want to know.

t_ch: 这一时肯定很难消化，我明白。但您应该能理解…庞德他真的非常在乎您，也希望能兑现自己许下的承诺。否则他绝对不会冒那么大的险……
t_en: This news may be hard to swallow, I understand. But you should understand... Pound really cared for you greatly, and hoped that he could trade himself to fulfill your wishes. Otherwise, he would not have undertaken such a great risk...

t_ch: …对了，庞德希望我能把这样东西交给您——是两张机动球比赛的旧门票，我猜那应该是你们一起看过的比赛。
t_en: ...Oh right, Pound wanted me to give you this — it's two expired tickets for the Roboball competition. I'm guessing it was a match you both watched back then.

t_ch: 颤抖着接过门票。
t_en: Receive the tickets with trembling fingers.

t_ch: 那…我要代为传达的就是这些，柯柯娜小姐。希望您往后的生活愉快……
t_en: Then... that's all I have to deliver, Miss Cocona. I wish you a happier life down the road...

t_ch: 柯柯娜直直地盯着眼前的植物，仿佛她的灵魂已经被埋进那片黑暗的土壤。
t_en: Cocona stares blankly at the plant before her, as if her soul had been buried in that blackened soil.

t_ch: 扔掉庞德的门票。
t_en: Throw Pound's tickets away.

t_ch: 两张门票消失在茂盛的叶片之下，没有发出任何声响。
t_en: The tickets disappear among verdant leaves, making nary a sound.

t_ch: 正如她的心灵在沉默中珠残玉碎。
t_en: Just like her heart shattering mutely among splintered pearls and jade.

t_ch: 扔掉唱片。
t_en: Throw away the record.

t_ch: 她把唱片丢进花坛，磕碰到边缘时发出一声闷响。
t_en: She hurls the record into the flowerbed, and it emits a dull echo as it hits the edge.

t_ch: 以那声响动为界，她再也无法逃脱悲伤之网。
t_en: As if that sound marks the end of a sentence, she is also a prisoner in this web of tragedy.

t_ch: 扔掉唱片。
t_en: Throw away the record.

t_ch: 她把唱片丢进花坛，磕碰到边缘时发出一声闷响。
t_en: She hurls the record into the flowerbed, and it emits a dull echo as it hits the edge.

t_ch: 以那声响动为界，她再也无法逃脱悲伤之网。
t_en: As if that sound marks the end of a sentence, she is also a prisoner in this web of tragedy.

t_ch: 扔掉庞德的门票。
t_en: Throw Pound's tickets away.

t_ch: 两张门票消失在茂盛的叶片之下，没有发出任何声响。
t_en: The tickets disappear among verdant leaves, making nary a sound.

t_ch: 正如她的心灵在沉默中珠残玉碎。
t_en: Just like her heart shattering mutely among splintered pearls and jade.

t_ch: （这里，应该就是柯柯娜记忆的终点了吧?）
t_en: (This place, it should be the destination of Cocona's memories, right?)

t_ch: （柯柯娜…你在哪里？）
t_en: (Cocona... Where are you?)

t_ch: 柯柯娜站在屋顶的边缘，一阵无声的风吹过她的秀发。
t_en: Cocona is standing at the edge of the rooftop, a silent wind breezing against her silken hair.

t_ch: 一滴泪珠顺着风的方向飞来，划过你的脸颊——依旧滚烫。
t_en: A single teardrop is carried by the wind towards you, grazing your cheek — it is still boiling hot.

t_ch: （柯柯娜……）
t_en: (Cocona...)

t_ch: （柯柯娜…必须让她冷静下来。）
t_en: (Cocona... I must calm her down.)

t_ch: （这恐怕是最后的机会…<color=#dbc291ff>我必须拉她一把。</color>）
t_en: (This may be my last chance... <color=#dbc291ff>I have to help her out.</color>)

t_ch: 柯柯娜，是我。
t_en: Cocona, it's me.

t_ch: 请允许我离开…事到如今，所有的道理我都听过了。再怎么努力都只是白费力气。
t_en: Please let me leave... I've heard it all by now. It's all pointless no matter how much effort I put in.

t_ch: 柯柯娜，还记得你的歌吗？
t_en: Cocona, do you remember your song?

t_ch: …「想象一朵未来的玫瑰」。
t_en: ..."Envision a Rose Forthcoming."

t_ch: 那首歌…呵，或许都称不上一首完整的歌…不过是件残次品。
t_en: That song... Hah, it probably can't be called a complete song... It's nothing but a third-rate defective piece of work.

t_ch: …就和现在的我一样。为了能在这个世界里生存，我不断地把自己的灵魂切片、丢弃…直到最后，剩下的只有一具令人生厌的躯壳。
t_en: ...Just like what I am now. To survive in this world, I have kept cutting off pieces of my own soul and discarding them... Until finally, there's nothing left but an empty shell that detests life.

t_ch: 成为店长的这一路，我学会了很多令自己厌恶的品质。我不断地背叛自我…以交换他人眼中的成功。
t_en: On the path to becoming a shop owner, I discovered many inner qualities that made me hate myself. I betrayed myself time and again... in exchange for what is so-called success in the eyes of others.

t_ch: 但我做不到彻底的改变。愧疚总能追上我，发自内心的拷问总会到来。我太扭曲，太痛苦，这片美梦里没有我的容身之地。
t_en: But I was unable to change totally. Guilt always caught up to me, inevitably interrogating my conscience. I was too twisted, and it was too painful — this dream had no place for me.

t_ch: 只要还有生命，一切都能补救。
t_en: As long as there's life left, everything is worth saving.

t_ch: …补救？您不理解…这就是我补救的办法，我的解脱。
t_en: ...Saving? You don't understand... This is how I will save myself, and this is my salvation.

t_ch: 无论发生什么，不要放弃自己。
t_en: No matter what happens, don't give up on yourself.

t_ch: …放弃？不对…这是我的解脱。
t_en: ...Give up? No... This is my salvation.

t_ch: 感谢您的同情。但您恐怕不会理解…对于我这样的人来说，这不是能由我做主的选择。来自里面的声音在牵着我走——我没有自由，只能任它摆布。
t_en: Thank you for your compassion, but I'm afraid you won't understand... For someone like me, this choice isn't up to me. The voice within guides me — I have no freedom, and I am only to be led by them.

t_ch: 顺应它一回也好。它答应了…只要跟着它，所有的不幸都会消失。
t_en: It's all right to respond to it, even just once. It agrees... As long as I follow it, all bad things will disappear.

t_ch: 和我谈谈心吧，柯柯娜…
t_en: Please talk to me, Cocona...

t_ch: 您的生活，大概过得很充实、很热闹吧？
t_en: Your life, I bet it was fulfilling and lively, no?

t_ch: 所以您才会觉得，一切困境都能靠着朋友间的亲密沟通来化解。
t_en: That's why you think that all hardships can be overcome through talking. Talking to your closest friends about your most innermost truths.

t_ch: 生活总会触底反弹，柯柯娜。
t_en: Life has its ups and downs, Cocona.

t_ch: 您真是一位乐观的人…我很羡慕。
t_en: You really are an optimistic person... I truly envy you.

t_ch: 我猜您的身边大概围绕着不少可以带来欢笑的人吧？所以您才能如此积极、阳光。
t_en: I'm guessing you've got plenty of people around you who can put a smile on your face? That's why you're so enthusiastic and sunny about everything.

t_ch: 我已经试过了…太多次。有时是哀求，有时是搏斗，有时任由黑潮把我淹没。
t_en: I've tried it before... many times. Sometimes it's begging, sometimes it's a struggle, and other times I'm drowned by its black tide.

t_ch: 不管我再怎么尝试，结果都不会变。<color=#dbc291ff>我赢不了，{F#女士}{M#先生}…我赢不了。</color>
t_en: No matter how hard I try, the outcome stays the same. <color=#dbc291ff>I can't win... I just can't.</color>

t_ch: …您听，它来了——它终于要带我离开这片悲伤之地了。
t_en: ...Listen, it's here — it's finally taking me away from this place of sorrow.

t_ch: 目送柯柯娜离开。
t_en: You watch Cocona leave.

t_ch: 柯柯娜转过头，向你投来最后一瞥。她的眸中饱含悲伤，孤寂，还有…感激。
t_en: Cocona turns her head, giving you one last glance. Her eyes are brimming with sorrow, loneliness, and... gratitude.

t_ch: 谢谢你，{F#女士}{M#先生}。谢谢你尊重我的意愿。
t_en: Thank you. Thank you for respecting my wishes.

t_ch: 我看到了…那朵玫瑰开了。
t_en: I can see it... That rose has bloomed.

t_ch: 柯柯娜转过头去，直面远方的一片虚空。你似乎还能看到她微微上扬的嘴角。
t_en: Cocona turns back, facing the curtain of void in the distance. You think you can see the corners of her mouth curl slightly.

t_ch: …这是我生命里最幸福的一天。
t_en: ...This is the happiest day of my life.

t_ch: 抓住柯柯娜的手。
t_en: Grab Cocona's hand.

t_ch: 你一把抓住了柯柯娜的手。它冰冷得令你刺痛，温度似乎正在从你掌间溜走。
t_en: You grab Cocona's hand in one sweeping motion. The touch of icy cold shoots a pain up your arm, the warmth seemingly draining from your grasp with each passing second.

t_ch: …{F#女士}{M#先生}？
t_en: ...{F#Miss}{M#Mister}?

t_ch: …您是希望把我留下吗？把我留在这个只剩疮痍的世界里，继续承受煎熬？
t_en: ...Do you wish for me to stay? To stay in this world with nothing but desolation, to continue bearing suffering?

t_ch: 我已经无法忍受了。这已经是我的极限…放过我吧……
t_en: I can't take this anymore. This is my limit... Let me go...

t_ch: 求求您……
t_en: Please...

t_ch: 放手。
t_en: Let go.

t_ch: 你松开了手。
t_en: You release her.

t_ch: 柯柯娜转过头，向你投来最后一瞥。她的眸中饱含悲伤，孤寂，还有…感激。
t_en: Cocona turns her head, giving you one last glance. Her eyes are brimming with sorrow, loneliness, and... gratitude.

t_ch: 谢谢你，{F#女士}{M#先生}。谢谢你尊重我的意愿。
t_en: Thank you. Thank you for respecting my wishes.

t_ch: 我看到了…那朵玫瑰开了。
t_en: I can see it... That rose has bloomed.

t_ch: 柯柯娜转过头去，直面远方的一片虚空。你似乎还能看到她微微上扬的嘴角。
t_en: Cocona turns back, facing the curtain of void in the distance. You think you can see the corners of her mouth curl slightly.

t_ch: …这是我生命里最幸福的一天。
t_en: ...This is the happiest day of my life.

t_ch: 抓住柯柯娜的手。
t_en: Grab Cocona's hand.

t_ch: 对不起，柯柯娜。
t_en: I'm sorry, Cocona.

t_ch: 我不能眼睁睁地看着你…坠落。
t_en: I can't just stand by and watch and let you... fall.

t_ch: 你依旧紧握着柯柯娜的手，尽自己所能传导身体的温度。
t_en: Your grip remains tightened over Cocona's hand, trying your utmost to transfer your warmth to her.

t_ch: 你觉得…自己是在帮我吗？
t_en: Do you think... that you're helping me?

t_ch: 你以为没有人尝试过吗…你以为我没有遇到过和你一样的人吗？
t_en: Don't you think others have tried... You think I've never met people like you?

t_ch: …都是瞬间涌现的自我感动罢了。你们不可能理解，那不是在帮我…不是……
t_en: ...They're all just trying to do something in the spur of the moment to feel good about themselves. None of you can understand. You're not helping me... No...

t_ch: 让我…解放吧。
t_en: Let me... be free.

t_ch: 放手。
t_en: Let go.

t_ch: 你松开了手。
t_en: You release her.

t_ch: 柯柯娜转过头，向你投来最后一瞥。她的眸中饱含悲伤，孤寂，还有…感激。
t_en: Cocona turns her head, giving you one last glance. Her eyes are brimming with sorrow, loneliness, and... gratitude.

t_ch: 谢谢你，{F#女士}{M#先生}。谢谢你尊重我的意愿。
t_en: Thank you. Thank you for respecting my wishes.

t_ch: 我看到了…那朵玫瑰开了。
t_en: I can see it... That rose has bloomed.

t_ch: 柯柯娜转过头去，直面远方的一片虚空。你似乎还能看到她微微上扬的嘴角。
t_en: Cocona turns back, facing the curtain of void in the distance. You think you can see the corners of her mouth curl slightly.

t_ch: …这是我生命里最幸福的一天。
t_en: ...This is the happiest day of my life.

t_ch: 抓住柯柯娜的手。
t_en: Grab Cocona's hand.

t_ch: 我的确理解不了，柯柯娜……
t_en: I'm sure I don't understand, Cocona...

t_ch: 但我知道…只要还有生命…就还有可能性。
t_en: But I know... as long as there's life... there are possibilities.

t_ch: 她冰冷的肌肤表面似乎长出了倒钩…火辣辣的痛感刺激着你的手掌。
t_en: The surface of her cold skin appears to have grown hooks... Sharp, searing pain pierces into your palm.

t_ch: 但你依然没有放手。
t_en: But you refuse to let go.

t_ch: 我受够了…我已经受够了！你们一个接一个地出现在我的生命里，一个接一个地送给我虚假的希望——
t_en: I've had enough... I've had enough! All of you keep showing up in my life one after another, giving me false hope time and again...

t_ch: ——然后半途而弃，把烂摊子留给我…任由它们在我身上寄生、腐烂、毒发……
t_en: ...And then abandoning me halfway, leaving me to pick up the pieces... Leaving them to grow on me like parasites, decaying, spreading...

t_ch: 我坚持不下去了…我受够了扮演所有故事里的悲惨配角。所有的不幸…求求你，让它结束吧……
t_en: I can't bear it any longer... I've had enough of playing the tragic support role in all these stories. All that suffering... Please, let it end...

t_ch: 我不想…再挣扎下去了。
t_en: I don't want to... struggle any longer.

t_ch: 放手。
t_en: Let go.

t_ch: 你松开了手。
t_en: You release her.

t_ch: 柯柯娜转过头，向你投来最后一瞥。她的眸中饱含悲伤，孤寂，还有…感激。
t_en: Cocona turns her head, giving you one last glance. Her eyes are brimming with sorrow, loneliness, and... gratitude.

t_ch: 谢谢你，{F#女士}{M#先生}。谢谢你尊重我的意愿。
t_en: Thank you. Thank you for respecting my wishes.

t_ch: 我看到了…那朵玫瑰开了。
t_en: I can see it... That rose has bloomed.

t_ch: 柯柯娜转过头去，直面远方的一片虚空。你似乎还能看到她微微上扬的嘴角。
t_en: Cocona turns back, facing the curtain of void in the distance. You think you can see the corners of her mouth curl slightly.

t_ch: …这是我生命里最幸福的一天。
t_en: ...This is the happiest day of my life.

t_ch: 抓住柯柯娜的手。
t_en: Grab Cocona's hand.

t_ch: 我不是你的亲人…不是导师…更不是医生。
t_en: I'm not your family... your mentor... not even a doctor.

t_ch: 我只知道…现在绝对不是放手的时候。
t_en: All I know is... it's absolutely not the time to let go right now.

t_ch: 冰冷和疼痛让你几乎感觉不到自己的手——但你还是握得更紧了一些。
t_en: You lose almost all the feeling in your hand from the cold and pain, but you still hang on even more tightly.

t_ch: 你看到柯柯娜脸上的悲伤、孤寂和愤怒都在缓缓流失…取而代之的是一丝诧异。
t_en: You see the sadness on Cocona's face, her loneliness and rage slowly subsiding... Replaced by a sliver of puzzlement.

t_ch: 我会一直握住你…
t_en: I will always hold on to you...

t_ch: …直到这片梦境崩解…
t_en: ...Till this Dreamscape disintegrates...

t_ch: …哪怕要强迫你留在这里。
t_en: ...Even if I have to force you to stay here.

t_ch: 您知道…您正在与之对抗的，并不是一个真实的人吗？那是一种疾患，一片梦魇…一个看不见也摸不着的敌人。
t_en: Do you know that... this thing you're fighting against... it isn't a real person? It's a disease, a nightmare... and an unseen enemy that can't be touched.

t_ch: 我知道您很强大…但不管您的力气有多大，也没法打败无形的敌人。
t_en: I know you're very strong... but no matter how powerful you are, you will never be able to defeat a formless enemy.

t_ch: 哪怕无意义，我也必须挑战它。
t_en: Even if it's pointless, I still have to challenge it.

t_ch: 为了留下你，我不得不去尝试。
t_en: If it means that you'll stay, I have to give it a try.

t_ch: {F#女士}{M#先生}…您真的是个奇怪的人。
t_en: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}... You really are a strange one.

t_ch: 那个声音…它现在散去了。它还会回来的，我很清楚——不过至少在当下，在现在这个瞬间，我暂时不受它的摆布了。
t_en: That voice... It's gone now. It will be back, that I'm sure of. But at least for now, in this very moment, I am not being wielded by it.

t_ch: 谢谢您，{F#女士}{M#先生}。谢谢您没有放弃我…哪怕这只是一时的宽慰。但至少您让我明白了…还有人在乎——还有人相信我能继续和它战斗下去。
t_en: Thank you. Thank you for not giving up on me... even if just for a fleeting moment. But you've at least let me understand now... that someone still cares — that someone believes in my resolve to fight it.

t_ch: 我还有最后一个请求，{F#女士}{M#先生}……
t_en: I also have one last request, {F#miss}{M#mister}...

t_ch: 我会仔细听着的，每个字。
t_en: I'll listen to every single word.

t_ch: 说吧，我会尽力满足。
t_en: Say it, and I'll do my utmost to grant it.

t_ch: 只要不会伤害到你就好。
t_en: As long as it doesn't hurt you.

t_ch: 柯柯娜的脸上露出了微笑——你确信那是发自她内心的，不掺任何杂质的笑容。
t_en: A smile breaks out on Cocona's face — you are certain the smile is coming from the bottom of her heart, unmarred by emotional complications.

t_ch: 可以请您…把手松开一些吗？还挺疼的。
t_en: Could you please... loosen your grip a little? It kind of hurts.

t_ch: （柯柯娜…她去哪了？）
t_en: (Cocona... Where could she have gone?)

t_ch: （得赶紧去找到她…希望一切安好。）
t_en: (I have to find her quickly... I hope everything's all right.)

t_ch: 啊，是您…刚刚，我好像做了一场很长的梦中梦——您也在我的梦里出现了。
t_en: Ah, it's you... I felt like I just had a long dream within a dream — and you were in it too.

t_ch: 梦的细节…我有些记不清了。但我隐约感觉……
t_en: The dream's details... I can't remember them clearly, but I can vaguely feel that...

t_ch: 柯柯娜的目光和你撞在了一起，她的脸颊突然泛起一阵红晕。
t_en: Cocona's gaze and yours meet, and her face suddenly flushes red.

t_ch: …我隐约感觉，我能继续站在这里…都是多亏了您。
t_en: ...I somewhat feel that the reason I'm standing here... is all thanks to you.

t_ch: 可我一直身处梦中，又怎么会睡着呢？我实在搞不清楚，难道只是一场幻觉……
t_en: But I've always been in a dream. How could I have fallen asleep? It's all very confusing to me. Could it have been an illusion...

t_ch: 其实不用搞得那么清楚…
t_en: You don't have to get everything clear...

t_ch: 说的也是……
t_en: That's true...

t_ch: 你没事就好。
t_en: It's good that you're all right.

t_ch: 谢谢您…至于其它的事，我还是不去多想了吧。
t_en: Thank you... As for the rest of what happened, I think I'd better leave that be.

t_ch: 我在匹诺康尼生活很久了，清楚有些事最好还是不要过问。
t_en: I've lived a long time in Penacony — I'm more than clear that some things are best left unasked.

t_ch: 我现在…感觉非常好。距离我上次感到这么…鲜活…好像已经过去了一辈子。
t_en: I'm now... feeling very good. The last I felt so... refreshed... It felt like a lifetime ago.

t_ch: 说来有些难为情，但我现在很想…唱歌。不知道您能不能理解我现在的心情……
t_en: It may be a little embarrassing to say, but I now really want to... sing. I don't know if you know how I feel right now...

t_ch: 毕竟那是你的梦想。
t_en: It is your dream, after all.

t_ch: …欸？您怎么会知道？我有和您提过这件事吗……
t_en: ...Huh? How did you know that? Have I ever mentioned it to you...

t_ch: 那就放声歌唱吧。
t_en: Go forth and let loose your voice then.

t_ch: …欸？但我…唱得并不好……
t_en: ...Huh? But I... I don't sing very well...

t_ch: 走吧，让大家都听到你的歌声！
t_en: Come on. Let everyone hear your singing voice!

t_ch: …咦？！等…请等一下……
t_en: ...Huh!? Please... Please hold on...

t_ch: 你一把抓住柯柯娜的手腕，将她带到了钟表小子广场……
t_en: You grab Cocona's wrist and take her to Clockie Plaza...

t_ch: 我…{F#女士}{M#先生}，我有些紧张，膝盖有些软……
t_en: I... {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, I'm nervous, and I can feel my knees going weak...

t_ch: 别怕，我是你最忠诚的听众。
t_en: Don't be afraid. I'm your most avid fan.

t_ch: 大家一定会爱上你的歌声！
t_en: Everyone will love your singing!

t_ch: 我会一刻不停地为你鼓掌~
t_en: I will keep applauding you!

t_ch: {F#女士}{M#先生}……
t_en: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}...

t_ch: 我…我明白了。我会试试看！
t_en: I... I got it. I'll give it a try!

t_ch: 这首歌的名字叫「想象一朵未来的玫瑰」——我想把它献给您…同时也献给我自己。
t_en: This song is called "Envision a Rose Forthcoming" — I wish to dedicate it to you... and to myself.

t_ch: 「请闭上眼睛，再往前看」
t_en: "Close your eyes and look ahead."

t_ch: 「那些未完成的画，仍在流淌的歌」
t_en: "Those unfinished paintings and the songs that are still playing."

t_ch: 「那缤纷的世界会是什么模样？」
t_en: "What would that vibrant world look like?"

t_ch: 「那里也会有梦吗？」
t_en: "Will there be a dream there too?"

t_ch: 「有深不见底的海吗？」
t_en: "Will there be a fathomless sea?"

t_ch: 「鸟儿会在落日时分歌唱吗？」
t_en: "Will birds sing at sunset?"

t_ch: 「时间的芬芳啊，你闻到了吗？」
t_en: "Can you smell the fragrance of time?"

t_ch: 「迷路的人，向前看，那里并非空无一物」
t_en: "Lost ones, look forth. There lies not void."

t_ch: 「只是那来自未来的玫瑰，还未盛放……」
t_en: "But that rose from future has yet to bloom..."

t_ch: （柯柯娜…不见了？）
t_en: (Cocona... disappeared?)

t_ch: （希望一切安好…要不还是回现实问问乔凡娜吧。）
t_en: (I hope everything's all right... Why not return to reality and check in with Giovanna.)

t_ch: 如果您刚从梦中醒来，请牢记——此处是现实。
t_en: If you've just woken up from a dream, remember — this is reality.

t_ch: 我找不到柯柯娜了。
t_en: I can't find Cocona.

t_ch: 找不到她了？您的意思是……
t_en: Can't find her? You mean...

t_ch: 将你看到的和柯柯娜相关的事情转告给了乔凡娜……
t_en: You tell Giovanna what you saw, and what happened with Cocona...

t_ch: 啊…我理解了。
t_en: Ah... I see.

t_ch: 请您不用难过，在梦境的世界里，这也是时常会发生的事情。
t_en: Don't be too upset. Stuff like this happens all the time in the Dreamscape.

t_ch: 有些人能够全身心地投入美梦，抛弃掉多余的杂念；也有少数人——像柯柯娜那样的人——始终无法融入其中。
t_en: Some give themselves completely to beautiful dreams, and toss away unneeded distractions. There are also few — like Cocona — who can never really blend in.

t_ch: 感谢您捎来消息，善后的工作会由我来处理。希望这件事不会影响到您游玩的心情。
t_en: Thank you for the news. I will handle the subsequent affairs. I hope this matter won't affect your mood during your stay here.

t_ch: 啊，对了…那家店总不能一直空着。我这就去联系苜蓿草家系，找人接手。
t_en: Oh, that's right... That store can't be left empty. I'll contact the Alfalfa Family to have someone take over the store.

t_ch: 请您放心——家族会确保您在「黄金的时刻」中的购物体验不受影响。
t_en: Please don't worry. The Family will ensure that your shopping experience at the Golden Hour will not be inconvenienced.

t_ch: （咦，怎么换了一个人……）
t_en: (Hmm? It's someone different...)

t_ch: 您好，欢迎光临，有什么需要的吗？
t_en: Hello, welcome. What do you need?

t_ch: 请问…柯柯娜去哪了？
t_en: May I ask... where Cocona is?

t_ch: 啊…您是说之前的店长吗？她已经辞职了，就在不久之前。
t_en: Ah... You mean the previous shop owner? She resigned not long ago.

t_ch: 您也是柯柯娜的老客户吗？很抱歉，柯柯娜因为一些…个人原因…已经离开这家店了。
t_en: Are you an old customer of Cocona's? I'm really sorry. It's because of... personal reasons... that Cocona has left this store.

t_ch: 如果您有需要，我们可以安排新的店员为您服务——不必担心服务质量，我们的每位店员都十分专业，保证能带您找到最中意的商品。
t_en: If you wish it, we can arrange for a new staff member to service you. And don't worry about the quality — each and every staff member is immaculately professional. I promise you'll be able to find what you want.

t_ch: 我是柯柯娜的老朋友。
t_en: I'm an old friend of Cocona's.

t_ch: 普莱佐的眉毛挤在一起，似乎有些面露难色。
t_en: Prezzo's brows tighten, his expression a little contorted.

t_ch: 啊…原来是老客户啊，十分抱歉。
t_en: Ah... An old customer. I'm truly sorry.

t_ch: 她有提到过我吗？
t_en: Did she mention me?

t_ch: 普莱佐的眉毛挤在一起，似乎有些面露难色。
t_en: Prezzo's brows tighten, his expression a little contorted.

t_ch: 啊…原来您是柯柯娜店长的老客户，十分抱歉。
t_en: Ah... So you're an old customer of shop owner Cocona. I'm truly sorry.

t_ch: 我可能有一条不那么好的消息要转告您：柯柯娜店长应该不会再回匹诺康尼了。这家奢侈品店很快就会有新的店主——
t_en: I may have some unfortunate news to tell you: Cocona is probably not returning to Penacony. This luxury goods store will have a new owner very soon...

t_ch: 「迷路的人，向前看，那里并非空无一物」
t_en: "Lost ones, look forth. There lies not void."

t_ch: 「只是那来自未来的玫瑰，还未盛放……」
t_en: "But that rose from future has yet to bloom..."

t_ch: <size=28>蒂娜！！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Tina!!</size>

t_ch: 我和你说了多少次了，别放这种让人心烦的丧歌！你还嫌我们家的客人不够少吗？！
t_en: How many times have I told you, don't play these soppy songs that annoy people! What, you think our business is booming right now!?

t_ch: 报、抱歉，普莱佐先生——我这就换一张唱片……
t_en: M—My apologies, Mr. Prezzo. I'll swap out a record right away...

t_ch: 实在抱歉，客人…刚才说到哪了——哦对！这家店很快就会迎来新的店主了。
t_en: I'm really sorry... Where were we... Oh yes! This store will have a new owner very soon.

t_ch: 在那之前，就由我来为您提供——在我力所能及的范围之内——最为优质的服务。
t_en: But before that, allow me to provide you with — to the best of my abilities — the highest in customer service.

t_ch: 普莱佐用力挤出一个生硬的笑容，脸上的褶皱拼凑出令人厌恶的纹路。
t_en: Prezzo squeezes out an unnatural smile with much difficulty, the folds in his face wrinkling into various grotesque patterns.

t_ch: 他的双眼空洞无光，仿佛被身后的城市吸走了魂魄。
t_en: His eyes are hollow, like his soul has long been robbed by the city behind him.

t_ch: 她的情商怎么这么低啊？
t_en: Why's her EQ so low?

t_ch: 本地人嘛，很正常。
t_en: She's a local. It's normal.

t_ch: 就那么爱出风头？
t_en: What a show-off.

t_ch: 她就是想上位罢了。
t_en: She's just trying to move up in this world.

t_ch: 店长啊，我和您说…
t_en: Shopkeeper, let me tell you...

t_ch: 不是我嚼舌根，但柯柯娜…
t_en: I'm not trying to be a tattle-tale, but Cocona...

t_ch: 嗯…我听说了。
t_en: Yeah... I've heard.

t_ch: 我来处理这事吧。
t_en: Let me settle this.

t_ch: 我已经不再需要那个「自我」了。她给我带来的只有伤害。
t_en: I don't need that version of "myself" anymore. She only brings me harm.

t_ch: 从今天起，我会重新开始学习生活。我会融入到他们的世界中去…我要自这悲伤中超脱。
t_en: From today, I'll start learning how to live again. I'll integrate myself into their world... I'll free myself from this sadness.

t_ch: 我还记得，我生命里唯一的那一丝甜蜜……
t_en: I still remember, the only hint of sweetness in my life...

t_ch: 什么门票，什么音乐。
t_en: Tickets, music...

t_ch: 不需要了——我全都不需要了。
t_en: I don't need them — I don't need any of them anymore.

t_ch: 在人群的鼓励下，柯柯娜的歌声变得愈发动听、自信……
t_en: With the crowd's encouragement, Cocona's voice becomes more euphonious and confident...
